items.title: Why spreadsheet skills still matter when AI tools are everywhere
items.businessQuestion: If a manager can ask AI for an answer, what still needs to be checked in the spreadsheet before making a business decision?
items.connection: This connects to the first BUS123 theme: technology can speed up work, but people still need to understand the data, formulas, and business tradeoffs behind the output.
items.discussionPrompt: Find one business decision from your job, campus life, sports, or a company you follow. What data would you want in a spreadsheet before you trusted the recommendation?
